volumeTitle: The Merchant. The Braggart Soldier. The Ghost. The Persian
label: The Persian (Section 2.2.208 - Section 2.2.234d)

sections.label: Section 2.2.208
sections.translation: What are you about now ?

sections.label: Section 2.2.208b
sections.original: Feminam scelestam te astans contra contuor .
sections.translation: Standing opposite to you , looking at a worthless woman .

sections.label: Section 2.2.209
sections.original: Certe equidem puerum peiorem quam te novi neminem .
sections.translation: For my own part , assuredly , I do not know any more good-for-nothing boy than yourself .

sections.label: Section 2.2.210
sections.original: Quid male facio aut quoi male dico ?
sections.translation: What mischief do I do , or to what person do I speak abusively ?

sections.label: Section 2.2.210b
sections.translation: I ’ faith , to every one that you have the opportunity .

sections.label: Section 2.2.211
sections.translation: Not an individual has ever thought so .

sections.label: Section 2.2.211b
sections.original: At pol multi esse ita sciunt .
sections.translation: But , i ’ faith , full many a one knows that so it is .

sections.label: Section 2.2.212
sections.translation: Heyday , indeed !

sections.label: Section 2.2.212b
sections.translation: Heyday , indeed !

sections.label: Section 2.2.212c
sections.original: Tuo ex ingenio mores alienos probas .
sections.translation: According to your own disposition you judge of the ways of others .

sections.label: Section 2.2.213
sections.original: Fateor ego profecto me esse ut decet lenonis familiae .
sections.translation: I certainly do confess that I ’ m just as befits one of a Procurer ’ s household to be .

sections.label: Section 2.2.214
sections.translation: I ’ ve now had enough of your chattering .

sections.label: Section 2.2.214b
sections.original: Sed quid tu ? confitere ut te autumo ?
sections.translation: What say you ? Do you plead guilty to what I take you to be ?

sections.label: Section 2.2.215
sections.translation: If I were so , I should confess it .

sections.label: Section 2.2.215b
sections.translation: Be off then ; you ’ ve got the victory .

sections.label: Section 2.2.215c
sections.translation: Now then be off with you .

sections.label: Section 2.2.215d
sections.translation: Do you then tell me this — whither are you going ?

sections.label: Section 2.2.216b
sections.translation: Whither are you ?

sections.label: Section 2.2.216c
sections.translation: Say you .

sections.label: Section 2.2.216d
sections.translation: Say you .

sections.label: Section 2.2.216e
sections.translation: I was the first to ask .

sections.label: Section 2.2.216f
sections.translation: Then you shall be the last to know .

sections.label: Section 2.2.217
sections.translation: I ’ m going not far hence .

sections.label: Section 2.2.217b
sections.original: Et quidem ego haud longe hinc eo .
sections.translation: And I , indeed , not far .

sections.label: Section 2.2.217c
sections.translation: Whither then , you rascal ?

sections.label: Section 2.2.218
sections.original: Nisi scieró prius ex te , tu ex me numquam hoc quod rogitas scies .
sections.translation: Unless I know first of you , you shall never know this of me that you are enquiring .

sections.label: Section 2.2.219
sections.original: Numquam ecastor hodie scibis prius quam ex te audivero .
sections.translation: On my honor you shall never this day know before I ’ ve heard it of you .

sections.label: Section 2.2.220
sections.translation: Is such the fact ?

sections.label: Section 2.2.220b
sections.translation: Is such the fact ?

sections.label: Section 2.2.220c
sections.translation: You are a worthless one .

sections.label: Section 2.2.220d
sections.translation: Rogue .

sections.label: Section 2.2.220e
sections.translation: That befits me .

sections.label: Section 2.2.220f
sections.translation: Me then it does not befit .

sections.label: Section 2.2.221
sections.original: Quid ais ? certumnest celare , quó iter facias , pessuma ?
sections.translation: What do you say ? Are you quite determined , you hussy , to conceal whither you are going ?

sections.label: Section 2.2.222
sections.original: Offirmastin occultare quo te immittas , pessume ?
sections.translation: And are you quite resolved to hide whither you are betaking yourself , you scoundrel ?

sections.label: Section 2.2.223
sections.original: Par pari respondes dicto . abi iam , quando ita certa res .
sections.translation: You are giving answer to what I say like for like ; be off with you then , since such is your determination . I don ’ t care at all to know . Good-bye .

sections.label: Section 2.2.224b
sections.translation: Stop !

sections.label: Section 2.2.224c
sections.translation: But I ’ m in a hurry .

sections.label: Section 2.2.224d
sections.translation: And , i ’ faith , I as well .

sections.label: Section 2.2.225
sections.translation: Have you got anything ?

sections.label: Section 2.2.225b
sections.translation: Have you anything ?

sections.label: Section 2.2.225c
sections.translation: Really nothing whatever .

sections.label: Section 2.2.225d
sections.translation: Show me your hand then .

sections.label: Section 2.2.225e
sections.translation: Is this the hand ?

sections.label: Section 2.2.226
sections.original: Vbi illa altera ést furtifica laeva ?
sections.translation: Where is that other , the pilfering left hand ?

sections.label: Section 2.2.226b
sections.translation: Why , it is at home , d ’ ye see ; I ’ ve not brought one hither .

sections.label: Section 2.2.227
sections.translation: You ’ ve got something , what it is I know not .

sections.label: Section 2.2.227b
sections.translation: Don ’ t be mauling me about you she-groper .

sections.label: Section 2.2.227c
sections.translation: But suppose I ’ m in love with you .

sections.label: Section 2.2.228
sections.translation: You employ your pains to no purpose .

sections.label: Section 2.2.228b
sections.translation: Why so ?

sections.label: Section 2.2.228c
sections.original: Quia enim nihil amas , quom ingratum amas .
sections.translation: Why , because you are in love with nothing at all , when you are in love with one who doesn ’ t return it .

sections.label: Section 2.2.229
sections.original: Temperi hanc vigilare oportet formulam atque aetatulam ,
sections.translation: It befits these youthful looks and age to be on the watch for pleasure in good time ;

sections.label: Section 2.2.230
sections.original: né , ubi versicapillus fias , foede semper servias .
sections.translation: so that , when your hair comes to change its hue , you may not be always in a grovelling servitude . Why , really , as yet you are not eighty pounds in weight .

sections.label: Section 2.2.231b
sections.translation: Still , that warfare is waged much more successfully by spirit than by weight . But I ’ m losing my pains .

sections.label: Section 2.2.233b
sections.translation: Why so ?

sections.label: Section 2.2.233c
sections.translation: Because I ’ m teaching those who know it all . But I ’ m loitering here .

sections.label: Section 2.2.234b
sections.translation: Do stop .

sections.label: Section 2.2.234c
sections.translation: You are annoying to me .

sections.label: Section 2.2.234d
sections.translation: And so I shall be then , if I don ’ t find out whither you are betaking yourself .
